title: Soothing itchy eyes in woodworkers with 10 herbal creams
description: Plantago major creams have been used to help with itchy eyes due to their anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. The creams contain plant compounds like aucubin and triterpenoid saponins, which can help reduce swelling and redness in the eyes. These properties can also help calm the skin and reduce irritation.
